meta.name: Auto Shield
meta.description: A clean, functional e-commerce design focused on automotive and lifestyle protection products. It features high-contrast typography, prominent red calls to action, and structured grids emphasizing utility and durability.

header.notes: Header includes a top announcement bar (black background, white text) with a close button. Main navigation features bold, uppercase links. A special highlighted link is in red.

footer.notes: Features a prominent newsletter signup section, multiple columns of links, a bold official sponsor banner, social icons, and a dark 'Back to Top' floating button.

productCard.notes: Minimal card design. Usually image over bold text title. No visible borders. Focus on clear imagery.

productGrid.notes: Clean horizontal alignment. Images are prominently displayed with titles directly beneath.

featuredProducts.heading: TRENDING NOW
featuredProducts.notes: Standard 4-column grid layout with large images and bold, brief titles below.

sections.name: hero
sections.layout: Full-width full-bleed background image with content overlay aligned to the left.

design.background: Full-bleed lifestyle photograph with subtle gradient or overlay for text readability.
design.text: Extremely bold, large, uppercase black typography for headline. Regular weight for body.
design.styling: No container borders. Includes large circular left/right navigation arrows.

content.headline: Bold lifestyle statement, ~4-5 words, split into multiple lines.
content.body: Short supportive sentence explaining the product utility.
content.cta: Single outline button with black text and border, square corners, uppercase.

media.description: Mother and child in a vehicle, conveying family, safety, and protection.

content.specialElements: Carousel dot indicators and play/pause controls at the bottom center.

sections.notes: Creates an immediate emotional connection focusing on utility.

sections.name: promotions

design.background: Left side has solid light grey background. Right side is an image with text overlay.
design.styling: Minimal spacing between the two blocks. Square corner aesthetics.

content.cta: Solid red buttons with white text, square corners, uppercase.

media.description: Right side shows a close-up of a multi-purpose protective mat being used with plants.
media.position: right column, full bleed within its container

sections.notes: Designed to push specific offers and versatile product use cases simultaneously.

sections.name: categories
sections.layout: Grid of circular elements, typical 6-column wrap on large screens.

design.background: Solid light grey background across the entire section.
design.text: Centered, bold, uppercase section heading. Small, bold labels below each circular image.

media.description: Grid of circular cropped images showing various automotive and home protection products.

items.image: circular cropped lifestyle or product shot
items.title: Category Label

sections.notes: Classic visual navigation to direct users to specific product lines quickly.

sections.name: trending

design.text: Centered bold section headline. Left-aligned, bold, normal-cased product titles.

media.description: High quality close-ups of automotive accessories installed in vehicles.

sections.notes: Highlights popular items without cluttering the view with prices or immediate 'add to cart' buttons.

sections.name: brand-story
sections.layout: Two main columns: large circular image on the left, text content and stats on the right.

design.text: Large bold section header centered above. Inner content uses bold subheaders and standard body text. Stats use large red numbers.
design.styling: Left image is cropped into a large perfect circle. Right column is divided into two sub-columns (text vs stats).

content.headline: WHY [BRAND]
content.body: Mission and vision statements emphasizing quality and domestic manufacturing.
content.cta: Single solid red button, square corners, white uppercase text.

media.description: Large circular image showing manufacturing process or factory worker.

content.specialElements: Rightmost area features bold red numbers representing statistics.

sections.notes: Builds trust and highlights corporate values.

sections.name: more-from-brand

design.text: Left-aligned bold section header. Bold labels below images.
design.styling: Images have slightly rounded top corners (barely perceptible) or are square. Clean layout.

media.description: Three distinct lifestyle/action shots: racing car, bracelets on rock, dog on grass.

sections.notes: Shows brand involvement outside of core product line (sponsorships, charity).

design.text: Very bold, uppercase headline with a red hashtag. Standard body text.
design.styling: Minimal padding, acts as a transition to the footer.

content.headline: JOIN THE #[BRAND]FAMILY
content.body: Call to action to tag photos on social media.
